name: budget_config_loaded
description: Cost tracker reads session_budget and monthly_budget from config
assert: cost-tracker.sh exits 0 and creates cost-state file

name: session_cost_accumulates
description: Cumulative session cost increments across calls
assert: session_calls in cost-state is 2 and session_total > 0

name: warn_at_80_percent
description: Warning emitted when session cost reaches 80% of budget
setup: set session_budget=0.001 in config, run cost-tracker.sh

name: exceeded_at_100_percent
description: Exceeded warning when session cost reaches budget limit
setup: set session_budget=0.0001 in config, run cost-tracker.sh twice

name: ndjson_log_appended
description: Each call appends an NDJSON line to cost-log.json
assert: cost-log.json has valid JSON lines with required fields

name: never_blocks
description: Cost tracker always exits 0 — advisory only, never blocks
